天骄榜，功法榜，阴谋榜。天辰大陆 天骄榜，势力榜，兵器榜，气运榜。曜日妖皇双生子，天妖体妖皇体，夜长生，敖无双，魔毅，光头和尚，池清蝶，刀沧海，无尘，这些人都非常非常不错，这本书非常好看，是我喜欢的类型！","text_exts":[{"e":49,"s":46,"text":"双生子","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%9F%E5%AD%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774209683142F7915%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227218860943979021112%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227166997950244064288%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E7%94%9F%E5%AD%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680772152,"group_id":"7166997950244064288","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"富在术数，不在劳作","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4JxKsKeaaRZU7toDQD8gZI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bf7c406fb6fd4489960aafd29bbe2df0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792544&x-signature=9bbMhQKdJ4PYX00gUFL9i%2BPLpXE%3D","user_id":"104673605400","user_name":"墨非初"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104673605400","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1749563044,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7166997950244064288","book_info":{"abstract":"谢辰穿越到天辰大陆，成为了天道殿的主人并觉醒了天道系统。
为了在这方世界打出天道殿的名号，谢辰开局打造天骄榜。
谷灵：“什么，我堂堂魔族魔子，天骄榜排名才第三。”
萧炎：“怎么可能，我东域公认最强天骄居然在天骄榜上仅排第五？”
刀沧海：“唉，被这天骄榜曝光，以后我的安稳日子没有咯。”
......
